zh.Porthamel, Anglesey, Wales: 威爾士安格萊波薩梅爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cynwrig ap Maredudd Ddu於1325年出生在威爾士安格萊波薩梅爾時，他的父親Maredudd Ddu ap Gronwy30歲，母親Gwenllian ferch Ithel Fychan15歲。他至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.Porthamel, Anglesey, Wales: 威尔士安格萊波薩梅爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cynwrig ap Maredudd Ddu于1325年出生在威尔士安格萊波薩梅爾时，他的父亲Maredudd Ddu ap Gronwy30岁，母亲Gwenllian ferch Ithel Fychan15岁。他至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Ddu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 竇, meaning ‘hole’ in ancient Chinese: (i) adopted as a surname by Yue Zhu and Yue Long, two sons of Shao Kang, the sixth king of the Xia dynasty (2070–1600  BC ). Yue Zhu and Yue Long are said to have adopted Dou (竇) (meaning ‘hole’) as a surname because their pregnant grandmother had escaped from a rebellion through a hole in the wall before giving birth to their father, Shao Kang, who later recaptured the throne. (ii) traced back to the Dou (竇) family from the Di ethnic group and some other families from the Xianbei ethnic group in ancient China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 豆, denoting an ancient stemmed cup of bowl: (i) traced back to some inhabitants in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) adopted as the surname by the Chi Xiao Dou (赤小豆) and Dou Lu (豆盧) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 鈄, referring to a type of ancient vessel for drinking wine: said to be borne by the descendants of the Duke Kang of Qi (died 379  BC ), who was ousted from his throne in the state of Qi and sent into exile. It was said that he was forced to use the vessel Dou (鈄) to cook food during his exile, and some of his descendants inherited Dou as the surname to memorize this period.

variants.name: Du
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Hong, Jian, Jing, Li, Ping, Yan, Yang, Yong, Bin, Chan, Cheng.  Vietnamese Thanh, Quang, Cuong, Dung, Hung, Binh, Minh, Duong, Hao, Hien, Liem, Lien.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 杜, meaning ‘birchleaf pear’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by descendants of Du Kang (杜康), an official noted as a winemaker during the reign of the legendary Huang Di, the ‘Yellow Emperor’ (c. 27th century BC ). (ii) from the placename Du (杜), the name of a city (located in Shaanxi province) granted to Du Bo (杜伯, the Earl of Du), head of the state of Du (杜), who was eventually killed by King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782 BC ). After that, the state of Du (杜) was annexed and the name of the state was adopted as a surname. (iii) adopted as a surname by the Du Gu Hun (獨孤渾) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534 AD ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 都, meaning ‘capital’ in Chinese: (i) from the personal name Zi Du (子都), style name of Gong-Sun Yu, an official in the state of Zheng during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the compound surname Gong Du (公都), which is sometimes traced back to Tian, a prince in the state of Chu who was granted the fief Du (都), or alternatively to Gong Du Zi (公都子), an official in the state of Qi.

variants.name: Dau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Son, Tuan, Dai, Dinh, Duong, Giao, Hoa, Huong, Khuyen, Linh, Mau, Phu.
North German, East Frisian, and North Frisian: from the Frisian personal name Douwe, from dou ‘pigeon’.
South German: from Davo, a short form of the personal name Tavold, formed with Old High German dau ‘custom, tradition’.

en.lifeSummary: When Cynwrig ap Maredudd Ddu was born in 1325, in Porthamel, Anglesey, Wales, his father, Maredudd Ddu ap Gronwy, was 30 and his mother, Gwenllian ferch Ithel Fychan, was 15. He had at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cynwrig ap Maredudd Ddu est né en 1325, à Porthamel, Anglesey, Galles, son père, Maredudd Ddu ap Gronwy, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian ferch Ithel Fychan, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cynwrig ap Maredudd Ddu 1325 in Porthamel, Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Maredudd Ddu ap Gronwy 30 und seine Mutter Gwenllian ferch Ithel Fychan 15. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cynwrig ap Maredudd Ddu è nato il nel 1325 nel Porthamel, Anglesey, Galles, il suo padre, Maredudd Ddu ap Gronwy, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian ferch Ithel Fychan, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia.

ja.Porthamel, Anglesey, Wales: ウェールズアングレセイポルサムル
ja.lifeSummary: Cynwrig ap Maredudd Dduが1325年にウェールズアングレセイポルサムルで生まれた時，父Maredudd Ddu ap Gronwyは30歳，母Gwenllian ferch Ithel Fychanは15歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Cynwrig ap Maredudd Ddu(이)가 1325년 웨일스 앤글레시 포섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maredudd Ddu ap Gronwy(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian ferch Ithel Fychan(은)는 15세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cynwrig ap Maredudd Ddu nasceu em 1325, em Porthamel, Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, Maredudd Ddu ap Gronwy, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian ferch Ithel Fychan, tinha 15 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cynwrig ap Maredudd Ddu родился в 1325 г. в местности портамел, англеси, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Maredudd Ddu ap Gronwy было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian ferch Ithel Fychan, 15. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cynwrig ap Maredudd Ddu nació en 1325, en Porthamel, Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, Maredudd Ddu ap Gronwy, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Gwenllian ferch Ithel Fychan, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija.
